zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicholas D'Ewyas Lord of Salmesbury 1326於大約1278年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾薩苗萊斯波利時，他的父親Sir John Del Ewyas49歲，母親Cecily de Samlesbury35歲。他和Joan Dacre至少有1個女兒。他去世於1355年之後在英國英格蘭藍卡爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicholas D'Ewyas Lord of Salmesbury 1326于大约1278年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾薩苗萊斯波利时，他的父亲Sir John Del Ewyas49岁，母亲Cecily de Samlesbury35岁。他和Joan Dacre至少有1个女儿。他去世于1355年之后在英国英格兰藍卡爾。

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

en.lifeSummary: When Nicholas D'Ewyas Lord of Salmesbury 1326 was born about 1278, in Samlesbury, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John Del Ewyas, was 49 and his mother, Cecily de Samlesbury, was 35. He had at least 1 daughter with Joan Dacre. He died after 1355, in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicholas D'Ewyas Lord of Salmesbury 1326 est né environ 1278, à Samlesbury, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Del Ewyas, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Cecily de Samlesbury, avait 35 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Joan Dacre. Il est décédé après 1355, à Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nicholas D'Ewyas Lord of Salmesbury 1326 um 1278 in Samlesbury, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Del Ewyas 49 und seine Mutter Cecily de Samlesbury 35. Er hatte mit Joan Dacre mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb nach 1355 in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas D'Ewyas Lord of Salmesbury 1326 è nato il circa 1278 nel Samlesbury, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir John Del Ewyas, aveva 49 anni e il suo madre, Cecily de Samlesbury, aveva 35 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Joan Dacre. Morì dopo il 1355, nel Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicholas D'Ewyas Lord of Salmesbury 1326が約1278年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアサムレスブリーで生まれた時，父Sir John Del Ewyasは49歳，母Cecily de Samlesburyは35歳であった。彼はJoan Dacreとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1355年以後にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas D'Ewyas Lord of Salmesbury 1326(이)가 대략 1278년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 샘레스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Del Ewyas(은)는 49세였고, 그의 어머니 Cecily de Samlesbury(은)는 35세였다. 그는 Joan Dacre(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1355년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas D'Ewyas Lord of Salmesbury 1326 nasceu aproximadamente 1278, em Samlesbury, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Del Ewyas, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Cecily de Samlesbury, tinha 35 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Joan Dacre. Ele faleceu após 1355, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicholas D'Ewyas Lord of Salmesbury 1326 родился около 1278 г. в местности сэмлесбури, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John Del Ewyas было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecily de Samlesbury, 35. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Joan Dacre. Он умер после 1355 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nicholas D'Ewyas Lord of Salmesbury 1326 nació aproximadamente 1278, en Samlesbury, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John Del Ewyas, tenía 49 años y su mamá, Cecily de Samlesbury, tenía 35 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Joan Dacre. Murió después de 1355, en Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
